name: Guard Destructive Operations
description: Warns before potentially destructive file or shell operations

then.prompt:
⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION CHECK

Before proceeding, verify:
1. Is this operation reversible? (git tracked, backups exist, etc.)
2. Does it affect shared systems? (databases, APIs, production configs)
3. Could it have broad blast radius? (recursive deletes, bulk updates)

If ANY answer is concerning, explain the risk to the user and wait for explicit confirmation.
If all answers are safe, proceed immediately without asking.
